name: HR administrators in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll reports/month tool
description: For HR administrators in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll reports/month, inaccurate time tracking causes payroll errors. We automate time tracking instead of manual time tracking and payroll calculation.
target_audience: HR administrators in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll reports/month
problem_solved: Inaccurate time tracking leads to payroll errors.
